reasons: Pharsa can follow Tigreal's grouped crowd-control setup with long-range AoE burst.
Tigreal's frontline engage lets Pharsa deal damage from a safer backline angle.

proof.summary: Tigreal groups and stuns enemies, while Pharsa follows from range with AoE burst into the controlled area.
worksBestWhen: Pharsa is positioned safely with ultimate ready.
The team has vision around the engage area.
failureCases: Tigreal engages outside Pharsa's follow-up range.
Pharsa is forced to reposition before damage lands.
Enemies spread before Tigreal starts the fight.

reasons: Odette can channel Swan Song after Tigreal groups enemies in one fight area.
Tigreal's setup increases the value of Odette's AoE damage during teamfights.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the grouped engage, and Odette follows with Swan Song AoE damage while enemies are controlled or forced to stay nearby.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal locks enemies before Odette commits.
The fight happens in a tight objective or chokepoint area.
failureCases: Odette is interrupted during Swan Song.
Tigreal catches only one low-value enemy.

reasons: Claude can follow Tigreal's engage with Blazing Duet into enemies held close together.
Tigreal gives Claude a safer entry window by starting and absorbing the first layer of the fight.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the grouped fight, and Claude enters after the setup to apply Blazing Duet damage around the controlled enemies.
worksBestWhen: Claude waits until Tigreal confirms the engage.
Tigreal controls enemy peel before Claude enters.
Claude has enough items to convert the AoE window.
failureCases: Claude enters before Tigreal lands control.
Enemy displacement pushes Claude out of damage range.
Tigreal engages too far from Claude's entry path.

reasons: Aurora can layer freeze and magic burst after Tigreal pulls enemies together.
The combined control gives the team a longer window to damage grouped targets.

proof.summary: Tigreal groups the enemy team, and Aurora follows with freeze control plus AoE magic damage into the same cluster.
worksBestWhen: Aurora holds freeze or ultimate for the follow-up window.
Allies are ready to damage the frozen group.
failureCases: Aurora casts before Tigreal confirms engage.
Enemies cleanse or disengage after the first control.
Targets are spread beyond Aurora's follow-up area.

reasons: Eudora can quickly burst a priority target that Tigreal has stunned or displaced.
Tigreal's control helps Eudora land her full combo on a target that would otherwise move away.

proof.summary: Tigreal locks a target in place, and Eudora follows with single-target magic burst during the control window.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal catches a squishy mage or marksman.
Eudora is in range with combo cooldowns ready.
The team focuses the same priority target.
failureCases: Eudora is out of range after the engage.
Enemy shield, magic defense, or peel keeps the target alive.
